base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of demitri — a character (boss) from 1994 darkstalkers. Demitri Maximoff — vampire lead protagonist. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Demitri Maximoff — vampire lead protagonist; Chaos Flare + Midnight Bliss transform-foe-into-female
